output: Validation completed. `pytest tests/test_moderation_decisions.py -q` initially exposed one real regression: `on_raw_reaction_remove` was writing a second `bot_auto_restricted` row after the restricted-emoji branch had already logged eagerly. I fixed that by making `bot_auto_restricted` markers suppression-only in the remove handler, then reran the targeted module to green (`20 passed`). After that, `pytest -q` passed cleanly (`241 passed, 3 warnings`). The throwaway `/tmp/smoke_moderation.py` script confirmed the suspicious `🤮` self-retract path end-to-end (`smoke-ok`) and was deleted. I also updated `.megaplan/plans/design-and-implement-a-20260419-1105/final.md` so the PR-body draft explicitly says `.migrations_staging/20260419110000_create_moderation_decisions.sql` must be copied into `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/banodoco-workspace/supabase/migrations/` before deploy, and it now includes the remaining manual Discord smoke checklist.

task_updates.executor_notes: Ran `pytest tests/test_moderation_decisions.py -q` and fixed the one implementation regression it exposed: `on_raw_reaction_remove` was double-writing `bot_auto_restricted` after the restricted-emoji branch had already written eagerly, so marker consumption for `bot_auto_restricted` is now suppression-only. Re-ran the targeted module to green (`20 passed`), then ran the full suite to green (`241 passed`). Wrote and ran the throwaway `/tmp/smoke_moderation.py` script to confirm the suspicious `🤮` self-retract path emits exactly one `user_self_removal` decision with `is_suspicious=True` and one admin DM send (`smoke-ok`), then deleted the script. Updated `.megaplan/plans/design-and-implement-a-20260419-1105/final.md` with the manual migration handoff note for `.migrations_staging/20260419110000_create_moderation_decisions.sql` and the required manual Discord smoke checklist. Baseline `pytest -q --tb=no` could not be captured before edits because the code changes were already in progress when T8 began.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `pytest tests/test_moderation_decisions.py -q` passed after fixing the duplicate `bot_auto_restricted` write on gateway remove, and `pytest -q` passed with no regressions (`241 passed`). The throwaway `/tmp/smoke_moderation.py` script confirmed the `🤮` self-retract admin-DM path (`smoke-ok`) and was then deleted. `.megaplan/plans/design-and-implement-a-20260419-1105/final.md` now explicitly notes that `.migrations_staging/20260419110000_create_moderation_decisions.sql` must be copied into `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/banodoco-workspace/supabase/migrations/` before deploy.
